label: Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs

node.label: Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs
node.definition: Models learn maps between functions or satisfy differential constraints, enabling learned simulators and surrogate PDE solvers.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs is to connect Fourier, wavelet & spectral transforms, Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers to downstream capabilities including Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins, Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting.
examples: substrate for Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins
substrate for Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting
limitations: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Fourier, wavelet & spectral transforms, Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers.

dependencies.rationale: Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Fourier, wavelet & spectral transforms.
Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers.
Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs follows the learning setup expressed by Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning.
Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Equivariance, invariance & geometric priors.
